The '''Vellakiya system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located in the [[Venaarian sector/Legends|Venaarian sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. It contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Venaari]].

{{System-stub}}
